global.accountCenterSubtitle: Manage your connected experiences and account settings across Ordnary technologies.

profiles.title: Profiles
profiles.description: Manage your connected experiences and account settings across Ordnary technologies.

descriptions.identifierLookup: Enter your email to log into an Ordnary account or create a new one.
descriptions.passwordEntry: To log in, enter the password associated with {identifier}.
descriptions.accountNotFound: We can't find an Ordnary account for {email}. You may not have created one yet. If you have created one, it may be using a different identifier.
descriptions.registrationName: This name will be used for account recovery and communications about your account. It isn't visible to the public.
descriptions.registrationBirthday: Use your own date of birth, even if this account is for a business or something else. This information won't be public.
descriptions.registrationPassword: Create a password with at least 6 characters. It should be something others couldn't guess.
descriptions.saveLoginInfo: We'll save the login info for your account so you won't have to enter it next time you log in.
descriptions.verifyEmailCode: Enter the 6-digit code sent to {identifier} to confirm your account.
descriptions.editEmail: Enter the email address where you can be contacted. This email address will be used for login and account management, and isn't visible to the public.
descriptions.loginCodeEntry: To log in, enter the code we sent to {identifier}. You may need to check your spam or social mail folder.
descriptions.recoveryCodeEntry: We've sent a code to {identifier}. Enter that code to confirm your account.
descriptions.resetPassword: You'll use this password to log into your Ordnary Account. Use at least 6 letters and numbers.

labels.name: Name
labels.logoutOthers: Log out everywhere else to make sure no one else can still access your account
labels.marketingEmails: I would like to receive emails about apps, recommendations, and offers for Ordnary Identity.

links.whyNeedBirthday: Why do I need to provide my date of birth?
links.noAccessEmail: No longer have access to this email address?

messages.nameHelp: Using your real name makes it easier to recover your account if you lose access.
messages.emailHelp: Use your corporate or personal email to access your Ordnary services.
messages.summaryPrivacy: Your Ordnary account details aren't public.
messages.verifyEmailLookFor: Look for an email from notification@ordnary.com. You may need to check your spam or social folders.
messages.termsAgreement: By clicking "Finish", you agree to our Terms of Service, Privacy Policy, and that you have read our Cookie Policy.
messages.footerAgreement: By continuing, you acknowledge that you have read and agree to our Terms of Service, Privacy Policy, and applicable data processing guidelines. You also agree to receive essential account and security notifications related to your use of the platform.
messages.resendCodeError: An unexpected error occurred while resending the code.
messages.credentialsPrompt: To log in, enter the password associated with {identifier}.
messages.checkEmailPrompt: To log in, enter the code we sent to {identifier}.
messages.termsIntro: By tapping Finish, you agree to our

validation.passwordMin: Password must be at least 12 characters long.
validation.emailInvalid: Please enter a valid email address.
validation.displayNameMin: Display name must be at least 2 characters.

errors.genericLoginFailed: Unable to sign you in. Please try again.
errors.accountLocked: Your account is locked or suspended.
errors.passwordIncorrect: The password you entered is incorrect.
errors.registrationEmailExists: An account with this email already exists.
errors.systemNoDefaultTenant: System error: no default tenant found.
errors.resendCodeFailed: Failed to resend code. Please try again.
